layers.name: Search Suppression
layers.one_liner: Bing returns zero results for gtcode.com. A control domain on the same stack is not blocked.

layers.name: Media Capture
layers.one_liner: Luke family donors to Civil Beat. Omidyar & Warren Luke: 12 years on the same board. Coverage of Luke/HNB: ~0.

layers.name: Judicial Sealing
layers.mechanism: Judge directs perjury, then seals the record
layers.one_liner: Audio-only recording. The crime was visual. The judge who committed it controlled the format and the seal.

layers.name: Oversight Nullification
layers.mechanism: 100% complaint dismissal rate for six consecutive years
layers.one_liner: 1,009 inquiries. 7 formal complaints. 0 sustained. Commissioner's spouse was an active judge for 21 years.

layers.name: Prosecution Blockade
layers.mechanism: AG declines authority using contradictory rationales
layers.one_liner: 2024: 'The power already exists.' 2026: 'No such power exists.' The bill is dead — killed by her own testimony.

layers.name: Report Suppression
layers.mechanism: Officer refuses to take report; no case number generated
layers.one_liner: Policy says 'shall.' Officer said 'stop telling me how to do my job.' PSO said 'totality.' No written authority found.
layers.live_detail: HPD officer refused report intake, March 6, 2026, 8:10 AM HST

layers.name: Direct Threat
layers.mechanism: Murder threat, witness tampering, testimony suppressed
layers.one_liner: Two voices, two roles, one message. 'Stay away from Jack.' 'Or you'll be whacked.' The jury never heard it.
